subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Covenant! Thy letter arrived, and the colourful poem was most delightful. I read it and was filled with joy [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده میثاق نامه رسید و غزل رنگین بسیار دلنشین بود خواندم بشاشت حاصل شد
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @personal instructions, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
